result.markdown: --- title: "Week 9: ARIMA models" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## Tutorial exercises - Complete Exercises 7, 8, 15 (a to c), 16 (a to c) from [Section 9.11 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/arima-exercises.html). - [Tutorial learning objectives](tute-lo.qmd). - [Week 9 Tutorial Solution.html](Tutorial9Solution.html){download="Week 9 Tutorial Solution.html"} ## What you will learn this week * Seasonal ARIMA models * Computing forecasts for ARIMA models * ARIMA vs ETS models ## Pre-seminar activities Read [Sections 9.8-9.10 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/arima.html) and watch all embedded videos ## Slides for seminar Download pdf ## Seminar code ::: {.callout appearance="minimal"} [week9.R](week9.R){download="week9.R"} ::: ## Assignments * [GA3](../assignments/G3.qmd) is due on Monday 05 May. * [IA4](../assignments/A4.qmd) is due on Monday 19 May.
